name: Pareve Kishka
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, blend together the matzoh meal, flour and farina. Set aside. Dice the carrots, celery and onion into a blender container. Add the eggs, oil, salt, pepper and paprika. Blend until smooth. Combine the vegetable mixture with the dry ingredients in the mixing bowl. Blend well. Divide into two portions. Form each portion into rolls about 12 inches long and place on a piece of very lightly greased aluminum foil. Wrap each roll securely in the foil. Place the rolls on a baking sheet. Bake for 45 minutes. Serve hot.
